title: How a rare scholarship brought 5 Mohawk siblings to Syracuse University
summary: Article profiles five Mohawk siblings who received a rare scholarship to attend Syracuse University. While focused on higher education rather than municipal services, the story may be relevant to workforce development and equity initiatives the CIO supports.
